case_title: THE SHERWIN WILLIAMS COMPANY VS. MARIA KROUZKEVITCH et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAVID W. BOSTON IN SUPP OF MTN FOR ORDER VACATING SANCTIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE SHERWIN WILLIAMS COMPANY

PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER VACATING SANCTIONS ISSUED ON 12/6/05 TO DAVID W. BOSTON, ESQ., IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE OR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE ORDERED VACATED. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: DAVE DAVENPORT, CSR#1694.

MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion for Order Vacating Sanctions issued on 12/6/05 to David W. Boston, Esq., in the amount of $200.00 is scheduled this day.
